description: Migrate a legacy patient roster from a CSV file to HL7 format by creating a NextGen Connect channel named 'Legacy_CSV_Import'. The channel must read '/home/ga/legacy_data/patient_roster.csv' (skipping the header), transform the data into HL7 v2.x ADT^A28 messages, and write them to '/home/ga/hl7_import/' using unique filenames. Ensure 'DOB' is converted from 'MM/DD/YYYY' to 'YYYYMMDD', 'Gender' is converted from 'Male'/'Female' to 'M'/'F', and fields are mapped to PID.3 (PatientID), PID.5 (Name), and PID.11 (Address). Access the environment via terminal, REST API, or web dashboard at https://localhost:8443 (admin/admin). All output files must be valid HL7 messages.
